tagline: Your Digital Guide to Disability Schemes
hero_subtitle: Discover which government schemes you qualify for, identify missing documents, and get step-by-step guidance — all in one place.
categories_subheading: Select a category to see schemes in that area, or check all schemes at once.
step1_subtitle: We'll use this to match you with the right schemes
step2_subtitle: Do you have these common documents?
passport_photo_desc: Recent colour photo on white background
bank_account_desc: Any nationalized bank or post office account
step3_subtitle: Your disability information determines scheme eligibility
has_disability_cert_label: Do you have a Disability Certificate?
has_disability_cert_desc: Issued by a government hospital / District Medical Board
disability_percent_desc: As mentioned on your disability certificate
no_cert_info: Without a disability certificate, most schemes will be inaccessible. We'll guide you on how to get one.
below_40_warning: Disability below 40% makes most schemes ineligible. A few healthcare schemes start at 35%.
step4_subtitle: Select all documents you currently possess
results_subtitle: Based on your inputs, here's how you stand for each scheme
error_voice: Voice not supported. Please use Chrome browser.
voice_categories: Say a category name to navigate there
